body:
Fix both. Proceed to 9.39.

Item 3: Do the full SaveSystemState/LoadSystemState field-by-field reconciliation. Fix the double-write. Get the file I/O round-trip correct for every field. Do not guess — trace every FileWriteDouble/FileReadDouble call in sequence in both functions and make sure they match exactly, field for field, in the same order.

Item 6: Add startTime field to the E99_Milestones struct, populate it at OnInit on first run (check if zero before setting, so restarts don't overwrite the original start), use it in E99_CalculatePathToMillion() instead of absoluteStartBalance. Days display should now be correct.

After fixing both: proceed with the full 9.39 coherence pass as already scoped. Everything 9.38 fixed should now be made coherent as a whole. Anything 9.38 couldn't fully resolve because it needed the full picture first — resolve it now. Compile clean. Send 9.39 .mq4 in files/from-agent/ with manifest. Relay milestone report.
